name: ai-conversation-intelligence
description: Unified AI conversation search, pattern mining, and automated skill/agent/hook creation from Claude Code and Cursor session history
author: Patryk Kopycinski

SessionEnd.prompt: A session is ending. Append this session's metadata to the analysis queue at ~/.claude/chat-browser/analysis-queue.jsonl for pattern mining in the next session. Use Bash to append a JSON line with sessionId, project (current working directory), and timestamp (ISO 8601). Do NOT perform any analysis now — just queue it.

SessionStart.prompt: Check if ~/.claude/chat-browser/analysis-queue.jsonl exists and has entries. If it does, mention that there are pending sessions to analyze and suggest running /mine-patterns to process them. Do NOT auto-process — just inform the user.
